purpose: The HIATUS glass-box explanation layer on the authorship_embedding LUAR cosine (from voice_fingerprint): it ATTRIBUTES the cosine where cosine_explanation only placed it side by side. Reports, per SETEC named interpretable feature (burstiness, MATTR, MTLD, function-word ratio, dependency distance), a SIGNED contribution to the modeled similarity (Latent-Space Interpretation, arXiv:2409.07072) and decomposes the cosine into an interpretable-feature-explained part and a FAITHFUL residual — the slice the named features genuinely do not capture (Residualized Similarity, arXiv:2510.05362). Program lineage: IARPA HIATUS / the AUTHOR consortium. DESCRIPTIVE only: it explains voice_fingerprint and never replaces its posture. Emits NO same-author / different-author / AI verdict (inherits authorship_embedding's refusals and adds none); the residual is an explanation-COVERAGE quantity, never authenticity / suspicion, and is never compared to a threshold. The DEFAULT/headline view is the side-by-side + per-feature agreement; the numeric explained_fraction is carried but gated behind calibration_status (ships uncalibrated → surfaced as not-yet-calibrated). Consciously extends spec 27 Open-Q1: it ships the explained_fraction the side-by-side withheld, reconciled by the calibration-gate + side-by-side-default. An unfit or near-zero-cosine input ABSTAINS (coverage_band: indeterminate) rather than fabricating a split.
use_when: You have a LUAR cosine you want decomposed into signed named-feature contributions
You want a faithful explained/residual split of the cosine with explicit fit provenance
You want to know how much of the similarity the named lens accounts for (the coverage band) and where the neural signal does work the named lens does not capture
do_not_use_when: You need a same-author / different-author / AI-vs-human verdict (the surface refuses all of these — it inherits authorship_embedding's refusals and adds none)
You would read the residual or the `largely-unnamed` band as a suspicion / authenticity / AI-ness score (it is an explanation-coverage quantity, an inspection pointer, not a score)
You want a per-pair operating point from the explained_fraction (it ships uncalibrated; it is honest fit provenance, gated behind calibration_status, never a shipped threshold)

compute.cost_note: the attribution + decomposition math is CPU/stdlib + numpy over injected vectors; the real-input path loads the LUAR style encoder via voice_fingerprint (~0.5–1.4 GB), so --inputs-json (precomputed) runs with no model

examples.description: Attribute a precomputed cosine + features + fit model (no model load)
Real path (loads the LUAR encoder via voice_fingerprint)
